cluster_name: Derry City and Strabane Innovation Ecosystem
strap: Derry City and Strabane's innovation footprint draws £1.36bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,285 grants spanning 5 active clusters, with Derry Life Sciences (38%) the largest single cluster and Queen'S University Belfast (36%) the dominant regional anchor by UKRI £. 22 Companies House-traced spin-outs region-wide translate to £62m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The region shows high-confidence "Validation–Coordination" stabilisation stacks at ecosystem grain — validation activity recurs through programmes and partnerships without the testing-and-narrowing motion that converts capability into market position.
